literal_meaning: through the wearing away of the outflows
preferred_translation: through the wearing away of the outflows
alternative_translations: through the ending of the outflows
definition: A standard liberation formula naming release through the wearing away of the outflows.
notes: Use this phrase record when the liberation formula appears as a whole. It should inherit the āsava headword default and keep the outflow-family wording stable rather than drifting into generic defilement-language.

example_phrases.translation: through the wearing away of the outflows, the outflow-free release of the heart and release by wisdom
example_phrases.notes: Classic liberation formula. Keep the outflow wording stable here.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use this as the standard whole-phrase liberation formula when the full asavanam-khaya expression is present.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not recast the phrase into generic defilement or generic ending language, and do not prefer the shorter compound record when the full phrase is the actual text being translated.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the full outflow-ending formula from drifting away from the repository's governed asava and khaya wording.
